rationale_source: F3.BR with unknown-field correction: F3.BR routing succeeds; canonical-map field extraction on unknown fields is Layer 3 product-design

intake_classification.rationale: F3.BR routes regardless of field-recognition status.

requested_loan_amount.rationale: Recognized fields process normally per Layer 3 #20 recommended-default (a) graceful-ignore-unknown + process-recognized.

must_not_include.rationale: Unrecognized fields gracefully ignored per Layer 3 #20 recommended-default; do NOT appear as canonical.

layer3_pending_decisions.scope: graceful-ignore vs flag-for-admin behavior on unknown-field corrections
layer3_pending_decisions.phase5_placeholder: spec assumes Layer 3 #20 recommended default (a) graceful ignore; revisit if Phase 4.5 selects different option
